items.title: 'Stuff of dreams!' | DJ goes on big birdie run to charge into US Open contention
items.summary: Dustin Johnson carded four birdies in a row during the opening round of US Open at Shinnecock Hills, seeing the two-time major champion charge up the leaderboard.

items.title: Awkward moment Harry Maguire has to listen to Lineker and Co heap praise on ‘refreshing’ Tuchel after World Cup snub
items.summary: GARY LINEKER shared a slightly awkward moment with Harry Maguire after praising England boss Thomas Tuchel. items.title: Ivan Toney hits ANOTHER hat-trick in secret behind-closed-doors England friendly as 13 stars get a run-out
items.summary: IVAN TONEY hit another hat-trick in England’s latest friendly. England beat MLS side Sporting Kansas City 5-1 at their Swope Soccer Village training ground on Thursday afternoon, less than 24 hours after the 4-2 win over Croatia. items.title: Canada star who came on for injured Ismael Kone in emotional tribute to stricken pal after World Cup goal against Qatar
items.summary: CANADA star Nathan Saliba paid tribute to injured Ismael Kone - after coming on to replace him. Anderlecht star Saliba, 22, scored Canada's fourth goal in their World Cup Group B rout of Qatar. But the game was marred by a horror injury to Kone. items.title: David scores hat-trick as Canada thrash NINE-man Qatar
items.summary: Canada are on the brink of qualifying for the World Cup knockout stages after a Jonathan David treble inspired a 6-0 win over woeful nine-man Qatar - in a result marred by a serious leg injury for midfielder Ismael Kone.

items.title: Toney scores hat-trick in England friendly win
items.summary: Ivan Toney and Morgan Rogers are among the scorers as England record a 5-1 win over MLS side Sporting Kansas City in a practice match on Thursday.

items.title: Kone injury is a 'huge loss' - Marsch
items.summary: Canada coach Jessie Marsch praises his players for their 6-0 win over Qatar at the 2026 World Cup in Vancouver, but says losing Ismael Kone to a serious-looking injury is a "huge loss".

items.title: 'Even the Coke is big' - visiting World Cup fans take in US culture
items.summary: Large portion sizes, tasty food, and a basketball championship welcome international World Cup fans to the US.

items.title: Canada rout nine-man Qatar but Koné injury sours first-ever World Cup win
items.summary: At full strength, Canada can go toe-to-toe with any opponent in the Americas. After steady climbs up the Concacaf charts and a credible run to the 2024 Copa América semi-final, all hope was that a talented squad could find their stride at a home World Cup. items.title: Canada boss Jesse Marsch goes full Alan Pardew on the sidelines as his team make World Cup history
items.summary: JESSE MARSCH guided Canada to their first-ever World Cup win - and was sensationally compared to Alan Pardew after busting some moves on the touchline. items.title: Emotional Jesse Marsch fights back tears in touching moment with Ismael Kone as Canada boss issues major health update
items.summary: CANADA manager Jesse Marsch gave an emotional update on Ismael Kone after his horror injury. Sassuolo star Kone suffered a serious looking injury to his leg in Thursday's World Cup Group B win over Qatar. items.title: Canada and Qatar in mass bust-up as World Cup clash descends into chaos at final whistle while ITV refuse to show scenes
items.summary: CANADA and Qatar's World Cup clash descended into chaos during a mass bust-up at the final whistle. The co-hosts dominated in a 6-0 thrashing during the Group B clash in Vancouver. items.title: Presenter who falsely claimed Lionel Messi’s dad had died during World Cup QUITS and issues grovelling apology
items.summary: ARGENTINE TV presenter Florencia Pena has quit her role after falsely reporting that Lionel Messi's father Jorge had died.
